title: Verify match-first statement reconciliation
preconditions: Approved statement evidence covering exact match, one compatible event with differing facts, compatible and incompatible active transfer/refund relationships, zero candidate, multiple or guard candidates, conflicting confirmation, stale projection, unsupported policy, owner approval, and replay.
steps: Apply every closed disposition through the public CLI; inspect active/historical transaction counts, supersession, dimension carry-forward or unknown initialization, relationship replacement or review block, evidence links, decisions, current states, errors, and exact actuals before and after; replay successful logical inputs.
expected: Exact match links the existing transaction only; approved correction leaves one active statement-derived replacement with attributable prior history and explicitly preserved valid relationships; an invalid relationship blocks correction with no financial change; approved no-candidate creates one Statement-only Transaction; ambiguous, stale, conflicting, or unsupported cases apply no financial effect; replay duplicates nothing.
